svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Claude meta-tool loop" id="meta-tool-loop"> <mxGraphModel dx="1414" dy="760" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=27;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#111827;" value="Claude as a meta-tool through LOOP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="500" x="240" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=13;fontColor=#6b7280;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">You give it an outcome, not the steps. It builds its own tools, checks the result, and reshapes its whole approach until it holds.</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="720" x="130" y="66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="looplabel" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7c3aed;letterSpacing=2;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">THE SELF-RESHAPING LOOP</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="322" x="312" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nOutcome" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fbbf24;gradientColor=#d97706;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="<b>AN OUTCOME</b><br><font style="font-size: 12px;">(not the steps)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="160" x="36" y="172" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nFind" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=22;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#faf9ff;strokeColor=#c4b5fd;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#3730a3;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Find (or re-think) a path" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="120" x="252" y="172" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nBuild" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=22;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#faf9ff;strokeColor=#c4b5fd;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#3730a3;fontSize=14;" value="<b>Build &amp; run</b><br><font color="#6d28d9" style="font-size: 13px;">its own tools</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="138" x="402" y="172" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nCheck" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=22;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#faf9ff;strokeColor=#c4b5fd;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#3730a3;fontSize=14;" value="<b>Check against</b><br><font color="#6d28d9" style="font-size: 13px;">the goal</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="124" x="570" y="172" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nMachine" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#34d399;gradientColor=#047857;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="<b>A REUSABLE<br>MACHINE</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="160" x="792" y="172" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="nOutcome" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="nFind"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="nFind" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="nBuild"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="nBuild" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="nCheck"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="nCheck" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#059669;strokeWidth=2.5;fontColor=#059669;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="nMachine" value="holds ✓"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="nCheck" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;dashed=1;curved=1;strokeColor=#7c3aed;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#7c3aed;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="nFind" value="<font style="font-size: 13px;">not there yet? throw it out → find a new path, reshape itself</font>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="632" y="300" /> <mxPoint x="312" y="300" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="band" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=8;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#eef2f7;strokeWidth=2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="214" width="908" x="36" y="356" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bandlabel" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#94a3b8;letterSpacing=2;" value="FOR EXAMPLE — ONE 6AM WORKSHOP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="500" x="56" y="372" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#FFB366;strokeWidth=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="116" y="238" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="116" y="356" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c2" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#97D077;strokeWidth=2;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="872" y="238" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="872" y="356" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="divider" parent="1" style="rounded=0;fillColor=#e2e8f0;strokeColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="2" x="489" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="exLeftTitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#475569;" value="The outcome I gave it" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="400" x="56" y="408" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="exLeftText" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#334155;" value="“Turn this 6AM AWS workshop — all config, no concepts — into a course I can actually learn from.”" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="410" x="56" y="432" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="exRightTitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#475569;" value="What it built — and I kept" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="400" x="520" y="408" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="exRightText" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontColor=#334155;" value="A personal course: an <b><font color="#047857">AI tutor</font></b> for my questions, a <b><font color="#047857">hands-on notebook</font></b> to rebuild it, and a <b><font color="#047857">scored test</font></b> for my gaps." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="410" x="520" y="432" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="exRightSub" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=13;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#64748b;" value="Reusable for the next firehose." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="400" x="520" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
